---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
page-layout: full
---

[Download PDF](cv/martaindale_cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank" style="margin-bottom: 1rem;"}
[Open Full Page](cv/cv.html){.btn .btn-outline-primary target="_blank" style="margin-bottom: 1rem;"}

<iframe src="cv/cv.html"
        title="CV"
        style="width: 100%; height: 1400px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 4px;"
        loading="lazy"></iframe>
